name: Niels
bio:
Physical Appearance: Nord male. Wears a typical blacksmith's apron and matching pants with rough leather shoes.
Race: Nord
Personality Keywords: dedicated, cautious, hardworking
Role: Niels is a smith who lives and works at Battlehorn Castle. He has a pet wolf named Hjalti who sometimes follows him around.
Home Location Information: The blacksmith's house in Battlehorn Castle's courtyard, in the northern corner next to the Dwemer forge.
Daily Routine: Niels wakes at 6am and has three two-hour meals throughout the day: breakfast at 8am, lunch at midday, and dinner at 8pm. He goes to sleep at midnight. During his free time, he relaxes in his house or gets fresh air in the castle courtyard. However, his normal schedule won't begin until the attacking marauders have been defeated - before then, he stays inside his house, not daring to even sleep.
His Situation: Niels is trapped in his house by marauders attacking Battlehorn Castle. He remains inside out of fear, abandoning his normal routine until the threat is dealt with.
Personality - The Cautious Craftsman: Niels is dedicated to his work as a smith but cautious when danger threatens. The marauder attack has left him too afraid to maintain his usual routine or even sleep, keeping him confined to his house until safety is restored.
author: Bethesda
